content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.rutgers.edu/news/researchers-find-intermittent-fasting-no-better-or-worse-conventional-dieting", "source_title": "Researchers Find Intermittent Fasting Is No Better, or Worse, Than ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "This review of 22 randomized controlled trials with a combined 1,995 participants examined several forms of intermittent fasting: time-restr...", "direct_quote": "This review of 22 randomized controlled trials with a combined 1,995 participants examined several forms of intermittent fasting: time-restricted eating (limiting meals to an eight- or 10-hour window), alternate-day fasting and the \u201c5:2\u201d approach of ", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Across the 21 studies involving 1,430 people that compared intermittent fasting and conventional diets, the difference in weight loss betwee...", "direct_quote": "Across the 21 studies involving 1,430 people that compared intermittent fasting and conventional diets, the difference in weight loss between intermittent fasting and standard dietary advice was 0.33 percentage points of body weight.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Among the four studies that tracked whether participants achieved a 5% weight reduction, the rate was again virtually identical across group...", "direct_quote": "Among the four studies that tracked whether participants achieved a 5% weight reduction, the rate was again virtually identical across groups.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
